title: RESTORE - 211info
text: COOS COUNTY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Habitat for Humanity ReStore (HFH) sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, plus a wide variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat homes for local low-income families. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4:30pm (541) 756-1600 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 756-1600 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos County Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
